query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pay.id) as payment_count FROM projects p LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId WHERE p.dataOrigin = 'manual' GROUP BY p.id, p.name LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pay.id) as payment_count FROM projects p LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId WHERE p.dataOrigin = 'manual' GROUP BY p.id, p.name LIMIT 5;
